sections.heading: Project overview
sections.body: The completed public-space installation shows how outdoor furniture is distributed across a large leisure environment.

sections.heading: What to notice
sections.body: Review furniture spacing, exposure conditions, circulation routes and the relationship between seating and the outdoor setting.

sections.heading: Potential project value
sections.body: A coordinated outdoor furniture plan can help define rest zones, maintain clearer circulation and create a more inviting leisure environment for different visitor groups.
